ranges.notes: Cold winter weather with temperatures often below freezing; festive atmosphere around New Year and Epiphany (January 6) with local events and low tourist crowds.
Mid-winter, very cold and often snowy; minimal tourism and some attractions may have reduced hours.
Cold weather continues; good for budget travelers seeking low prices but limited outdoor activities.
End of January can be slightly less cold; indoor cultural venues like museums and theaters active; still very low crowds.
Still deep winter, cold weather, often snow-covered; low tourist activity but good hotel deals.
Major international film festival attracts visitors; indoor event, cold weather remains but cultural scene vibrant; moderate crowds.
Cold but slowly increasing daylight; fewer tourists but good for museum visits and exploring urban life.
Transition to early spring; still chilly but improving weather; low crowds; some rain possible.
Increasing temperatures, longer days; good time for city walks and visiting parks; moderate crowds starting.
Festive local markets and cultural events; early spring blooms begin; pleasant weather for sightseeing; growing tourist interest.
Spring is well underway; mild weather and increased outdoor activity; good time for exploring Łódź’s parks and street art.
Early April can be rainy but temperatures rise; blooming parks and gardens; moderate tourist numbers.
Significant local celebrations and Easter markets; popular time for Polish families; pleasant spring weather, some crowds.
Late April offers mild weather and longer daylight; excellent for outdoor activities and cultural tours; moderate to high crowds.
Early May holidays bring local festivities and mild weather; perfect for sightseeing and outdoor events; crowds increase around holidays.
Stable warm weather and blooming greenery; ideal for walking tours and cultural activities; moderate crowds.
May is one of the best months for visiting Łódź with warm temperatures and many outdoor festivals; moderate to high crowds.
Summer begins with warm, pleasant weather; excellent for outdoor events and exploring city parks; moderate crowds.
Major international design event attracting visitors worldwide; great weather and vibrant cultural scene; higher crowds.
Warm summer weather continues; some days can be hot; good for festivals and outdoor cafes; moderate crowds.
High summer with warm to hot temperatures; good for outdoor activities but some tourists find it too warm; moderate crowds.
While not in Łódź, some visitors stay in Łódź for this major music festival nearby; warm weather but higher accommodation prices and some crowd spillover.
Hot weather can be uncomfortable for some; fewer major events in the city; moderate to low crowds as many locals vacation elsewhere.
Warm summer weather persists; some rain possible; city quieter as many Poles vacation elsewhere; good for budget travelers.
Notable cultural event showcasing urban art; pleasant weather encourages outdoor exploration; moderate crowds.
Late summer heat can be oppressive; city is calm; good deals on accommodation; fewer events.
Early autumn brings mild temperatures and lower rainfall; ideal time for outdoor sightseeing and festivals; moderate crowds.
Popular annual light art festival transforms the city in evenings; great cultural experience with mild weather; higher crowds.
Mid to late September is comfortable and less crowded; good for cultural visits and outdoor cafes; cooler evenings.
Autumn colors visible in parks; cooler temperatures but still comfortable; fewer tourists; ideal for cultural experiences.
Renowned music festival attracting jazz fans; cooler weather; indoor venues; moderate crowds.
Late October can be rainy and chilly; indoor cultural activities recommended; low tourist presence.
Cold and often gray weather; All Saints’ Day is a solemn national holiday with local customs; low tourist activity.
Late autumn chill, wet and gray; many outdoor attractions less appealing; low crowd levels.
Increasingly cold weather; early winter conditions start; indoor activities recommended; very low crowds and low prices.
Cold weather with possible snow; Christmas markets start opening; festive atmosphere builds; moderate crowds.
Active Christmas markets and events; cold but magical ambiance; moderate to high crowds especially on weekends.
Holiday celebrations with festive events; cold weather; some attractions closed on Christmas Day; crowds vary.
